import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { SparklesIcon, ChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon, AcademicCapIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowRightIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, LightBulbIcon, ClockIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, RocketLaunchIcon, UserGroupIcon, CloudArrowUpIcon, CpuChipIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Home = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); if (user) { window.location.href = '/dashboard'; return null; } const features = [ { icon: CloudArrowUpIcon, title: "Smart Resume Upload", description: "Upload PDF/DOCX resumes. AI extracts and analyzes your skills instantly.", color: "from-blue-500 to-cyan-500", iconColor: "text-blue-600" }, { icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon, title: "Job Description Analysis", description: "Paste any job description - our AI finds the perfect match with your skills.", color: "from-purple-500 to-pink-500", iconColor: "text-purple-600" }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: "ATS Score & Insights", description: "Get your resume's ATS compatibility score with detailed improvement tips.", color: "from-green-500 to-emerald-500", iconColor: "text-green-600" }, { icon: AcademicCapIcon, title: "Skill Gap Analysis", description: "Identify missing skills and get personalized learning recommendations.", color: "from-orange-500 to-red-500", iconColor: "text-orange-600" }, { icon: LightBulbIcon, title: "Smart Suggestions", description: "AI-powered recommendations to make your resume stand out to recruiters.", color: "from-yellow-500 to-amber-500", iconColor: "text-yellow-600" }, { icon: ClockIcon, title: "Track Progress", description: "Save all analyses and watch your resume improve over time.", color: "from-indigo-500 to-purple-500", iconColor: "text-indigo-600" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "98%", label: "Accuracy Rate", icon: CheckCircleIcon }, { value: "10,000+", label: "Resumes Analyzed", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { value: "500+", label: "Skills Database", icon: AcademicCapIcon }, { value: "24/7", label: "AI Support", icon: SparklesIcon } ]; return (
